case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. HENRY D STOCKWELL ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-17-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKWELL, HENRY D DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-28-2019
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100036788), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. SERVED AUG-10-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKWELL, HENRY D
NOTICE OF DISASSOCIATION (TRANSACTION ID # 100083334) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STOCKWELL, HENRY D $955.00 PRINCIPAL, $293.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,248.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100083334)
ATTORNEY DECLARATION RE: COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 100083334) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-17-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $293.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100083334) AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKWELL, HENRY D
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100083334) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-17-2019 CONTINUED TO DEC-17-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
